g.text: All CIMTool subsystems (xmi, profiles, validation, easyrules, CLI) interact with RDF data
exclusively through the Kena API. No subsystem calls Apache Jena directly. This layer
insulates the codebase from Jena's complexity and from potential future Jena version changes.
inference is required. Wraps the plain

hierarchy on repeated merges. It first
decomposes both models by peeling off
layers to reach the raw underlying
This is the core architectural pattern of the Kena layer. OntModel query methods
delegate to Jena's Graph.find() which returns a raw Triple iterator. Kena's filter
classes transform that iterator into a typed OntResource iterator without copying data.
in the store. No data is copied.
